notes: 2026-04-26: Task 10/3 — Implemented animation primitives (crates/motif_core/src/animation.rs, ~170 lines + 16 tests). dep_audit_2026_04_26.notes: All deps at same versions as 2026-04-19 audit. No urgent updates needed.

files_changed: crates/motif_core/src/lib.rs (pub mod animation + pub use animation::*)
animation_primitives_pr_2026_04_26.approach: Animation struct with Instant start + Duration duration. progress() returns 0.0..=1.0 clamped. Easing fns: linear, ease_in (cubic), ease_out (cubic), ease_in_out (cubic). Zero new deps.
animation_primitives_pr_2026_04_26.notes: Implements p3 spool task 'Design animation primitives' from animation stream. TDD: 16 tests covering endpoints, clamp, monotonicity, restart, elapsed/remaining edge cases.

cursor_blink_pr_2026_04_20.approach: 530 ms WaitUntil via about_to_wait; toggles in new_events on ResumeTimeReached; resets to visible on click/keypress. Zero new deps.
cursor_blink_pr_2026_04_20.notes: cursor_visible defaults to true so existing TextInput users are unaffected

text_metrics_example_pr_2026_04_21.approach: layout_text(text, font_size) → line_metrics()/font_metrics(); overlay 1px quads at baseline/ascent/descent/cap_height/x_height/underline with paint_quad; labels via paint_text. Zero new deps.
text_metrics_example_pr_2026_04_21.notes: Resolves issue #51. Uses only existing TextLayout, DrawContext APIs.

clipboard_pr_2026_04_18.approach: NSPasteboard via objc2-app-kit 0.2 on macOS; no-op stubs on other platforms. Zero new deps — only added NSPasteboard feature to existing objc2-app-kit dep.
